nasb.text: this is the copy of the letter which they sent to him: “To King Artaxerxes: Your servants, the men in the region beyond the River, and now

esv.text: (This is a copy of the letter that they sent.) “To Artaxerxes the king: Your servants, the men of the province Beyond the River, send greeting. And now

cnv.text: 這就是他們呈給亞達薛西王的奏文副本：“你的臣僕，就是河西那邊的人，上奏亞達薛西王：

ccb.text: 上奏亚达薛西王， “‘幼发拉底河西的臣民奏告亚达薛西王，
